title: [Genetic counseling in osteodystrophy Albright syndrome. Part I. Phenotypic diagnosis and pedigree analysis].
author_string: Morawska, Justyna, Janusz, Leszek, Wasilewska, Ewa, Sierakowski, Stanisław, Midro, Alina T
abstract: In this article we describe problems of genetic counseling with features of morphological phenotype, biochemical and molecular changes observed in osteodystrophy Albright syndrome, inherited autosomal dominant condition.
